name: tnabet-plugins
description: Personal Claude Code plugins by tnabet

plugins.name: generate-architecture
plugins.description: Génère une documentation d'architecture technique (ARCHITECTURE.md) en utilisant le LSP et des subagents.

plugins.name: reviewing-design-specs
plugins.description: Structured review of technical design specs (Confluence, Markdown, text) - coherence, over-engineering, SOLID, HTTP semantics, GDPR, CDN/Varnish PII leaks, observability, architectural N+1, and domain-specific concerns (email, API, data pipeline, auth, payments).

plugins.name: olive
plugins.description: Senior-engineer devil's advocate. Challenges AI-generated plans, designs, architecture decisions, and code before they ship — surfaces blind spots, hidden assumptions, failure modes, and optimistic shortcuts via steel-manning, pre-mortem, inversion, and Socratic questioning.
